summary: Iteration 127: POS Menu Analytics + BEO Audit Trail - All 17 backend tests passed, frontend POSMenuAnalytics panel fully functional with Overview/Items/Alerts views, outlet filtering, and quadrant classification.

verified_features.GET_api_pos_analytics_menu_items: ✓ Returns items with food_cost, contribution_margin, food_cost_pct, quadrant, units_sold
verified_features.GET_api_pos_analytics_top_performers: ✓ Returns top revenue items sorted descending
verified_features.GET_api_pos_analytics_profit_alerts: ✓ Returns items with FC% > 35% or low margin (14 alerts found)
verified_features.PUT_api_beo_engine_beo_revise: ✓ Increments revision, snapshots previous version, logs changes
verified_features.GET_api_beo_engine_beo_audit: ✓ Runs self-audit checking financial integrity, cascade verification
verified_features.POST_api_beo_engine_beo_sign: ✓ Locks revision as client-approved, updates status
verified_features.GET_api_beo_engine_notifications: ✓ Returns BEO revision notifications for departments
verified_features.GET_api_echo_events_report: ✓ Returns merged events collection + BEO pipeline data
verified_features.POSMenuAnalytics_overview_view: ✓ Shows KPIs, quadrant summary, top revenue items table
verified_features.POSMenuAnalytics_items_view: ✓ Shows all 73 active menu items with full analytics

seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (1452 POS transactions, 50 BEOs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: POS Menu Analytics fully functional with yield-based costing from pos_transactions (1452 seeded). BEO Audit Trail working with revision control, self-audit, and signature locking. Echo Events report merges events collection with BEO pipeline data. All new features from iteration 127 verified working.
